summary: Made two surgical seam edits: rewrote the opening paragraph to reduce overlap with the previous chapter's damage-summary carryover while keeping the same scene information, and adjusted the closing beat so it hands off more directly into chapter 17's extended focus on the same notation passage in the innermost room.
edits: Reframed the opening around the fifth-floor corridor's present physical state instead of repeating the prior chapter's summarized damage progression.
Adjusted the final beat to return Gavin to a specific snagging section of notation, smoothing the transition into the next chapter's opening concentration on the manuscript.
